title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 08 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 08 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 08 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/08/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep downward all the day.The main contract closed at 737.5,,increased of 4.31%. Traders are generallymotivated to ship, Speculative demand increases. Steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 785-795 yuan/mt;,increase 10-20 yuan/mt than last week.
